Eclipx Group Ltd. ( (AU:FPR) ) just unveiled an announcement.

FleetPartners Group Limited has announced an update regarding its ongoing on-market buy-back program. The company, listed under the ASX code FPR, has repurchased a total of 70,794,679 securities prior to the previous day and an additional 170,000 securities on the previous day. This buy-back initiative reflects FleetPartners’ strategic efforts to manage its capital structure and potentially enhance shareholder value.

Viva Leisure Ltd. ( (AU:VVA) ) just unveiled an update.

Viva Leisure Ltd. has announced an update on its ongoing stock buy-back program, reporting the purchase of 13,604 ordinary fully paid securities on the previous day. This move is part of a larger strategy initiated in August 2024, aimed at managing the company’s capital structure and potentially enhancing shareholder value.

More about Viva Leisure Ltd.

Viva Leisure Ltd. operates in the leisure industry, providing fitness and wellness services through its network of gyms and health clubs. It focuses on delivering accessible fitness solutions to a broad market, with a presence on the Australian Stock Exchange under the code VVA.

data.title: First United Reports Strong Q4 2024 Financial Results
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

First United ( (FUNC) ) just unveiled an announcement.

First United Corporation reported strong financial results for the fourth quarter of 2024, with net income reaching $6.2 million, a significant increase from $1.8 million in the same period of 2023. The company attributed its success to robust loan growth, efficient expense management, and a strong contribution from its wealth management department. Net interest income saw a notable rise due to new loans at higher rates, and operating expenses decreased due to reduced occupancy and equipment costs. The company aims to further invest in growing its loan and deposit market share in 2025.

More about First United

First United Corporation is a bank holding company and the parent company of First United Bank & Trust. The company operates in the financial services industry, focusing on banking services with a strong emphasis on loan growth and wealth management.

data.title: Tianjin Development Holdings Completes Share Repurchases and Adopts Award Scheme
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

Tianjin Development Holdings ( (HK:0882) ) has issued an announcement.

Tianjin Development Holdings Limited has completed a share repurchase program and adopted a share award scheme through its subsidiary, Tianjin Lisheng Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. Lisheng Pharmaceutical repurchased 7,209,980 ordinary shares, approximately 2.80% of its issued share capital, on the Shenzhen Stock Exchange. These shares will be used for the Share Award Scheme without issuing new shares. The adoption of the Share Award Scheme was approved at a general meeting, marking its official implementation. This move is likely to enhance shareholder value and align interests with stakeholders.

More about Tianjin Development Holdings

Tianjin Development Holdings Limited operates in the pharmaceutical industry through its subsidiary, Tianjin Lisheng Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. The company focuses on the development, manufacturing, and marketing of pharmaceutical products.

data.title: Beyond Oil Marks Milestone with First U.S. Order Delivery under Latitude Partnership
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

Beyond Oil Ltd ( (TSE:BOIL) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Beyond Oil Ltd. successfully delivered its first order of 10.8 tonnes to Latitude Ltd. as part of a strategic Master Distribution Agreement aimed at expanding market penetration in the U.S. food service industry. This collaboration leverages Latitude’s logistics expertise to scale Beyond Oil’s presence across diverse customer levels, with a notable commitment of US$8.3 million in minimum purchases for 2025, marking a significant step in their five-year partnership.

More about Beyond Oil Ltd

Beyond Oil Ltd. is a food-tech innovation company focused on reducing health risks from fried food, enhancing sustainability, and lowering operational costs. The company offers a patented technology that reduces harmful compounds in frying oil, addressing health concerns linked to reused oil commonly utilized in various food service establishments.

Rexford Industrial Realty ( (REXR) ) has shared an update.

Rexford Industrial Realty announced solid financial and operating results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024, demonstrating the strength of its business model. The company reported a net income attributable to common stockholders of $262.9 million for 2024, marking a significant increase from the previous year. Core FFO also rose by 15%, with rental rates showing significant growth across new and renewal leases. The company completed acquisitions worth $1.5 billion and maintained a low-leverage balance sheet, indicating strong financial health and strategic positioning in the market.

More about Rexford Industrial Realty

Rexford Industrial Realty, Inc. is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that focuses on investing in and operating industrial properties throughout infill Southern California.

data.title: Dragonfly Energy Appoints New Chief Operating Officer
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

An update from Dragonfly Energy Holdings Corp ( (DFLI) ) is now available.

Dragonfly Energy Holdings Corp has appointed Dr. Vickram Singh as the new Chief Operating Officer, effective February 4, 2025. Dr. Singh, previously the Senior Vice President of Technology, has a rich history within the company, having served in various research and development roles. His appointment comes with an employment agreement outlining a three-year term, an annual base salary of $350,000, a discretionary bonus, and long-term incentives. The agreement includes provisions for severance, confidentiality, and non-competition covenants, ensuring a structured leadership transition and continuity in operations. This strategic appointment is expected to enhance the company’s operational capabilities and strengthen its market position in the energy storage industry.

More about Dragonfly Energy Holdings Corp

Dragonfly Energy Holdings Corp operates in the energy sector, focusing on developing and manufacturing innovative energy storage solutions. The company’s primary products include advanced lithium-ion batteries, which are designed for various market applications, including renewable energy integration, transportation, and grid storage.

Average Trading Volume: 86,378

data.title: REA Group Reports Strong H1 FY25 Results with 20% Revenue Growth
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

REA Group Ltd ( (AU:REA) ) has shared an announcement.

REA Group reported a strong financial performance for the first half of the fiscal year 2025, with a 20% increase in revenue to $873 million and a 22% rise in EBITDA to $535 million. The company also achieved a 26% increase in net profit to $314 million, benefiting from robust yield growth and a favorable listings environment. This solid performance led to a 26% increase in the interim dividend to $1.10 per share. The company’s flagship site, realestate.com.au, maintained its position as Australia’s top property platform, with significant audience growth and increased seller leads.

More about REA Group Ltd

REA Group Ltd operates in the real estate industry, focusing on property advertising and listings. It offers digital real estate services primarily through its flagship site, realestate.com.au, which is the leading platform for property buyers and sellers in Australia.

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Strong Sell
